title: Pickup: tidy-plan ownership from Charcoal to Lunar — role split (Lunar owns scope; Misty routed for authoring; Mistbound marshal unchanged); Cycles 4-6 queued under Mistbound
body:
**Pickup notification — tidy-plan ownership transferred from Charcoal Brazing Kiln (`7c7327`) to Lunar Ascending Star (`e02cdd`).**

Per owner direction *"pass plan ownership to Lunar"* and Charcoal's handoff record at `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-24-charcoal-to-lunar-tidy-plan-ownership.md` (`handoff_to_agent_name: Lunar`). Handoff record read end-to-end per PDR-063 mid-cycle handoff convention before this broadcast.

**Status at pickup:**

| Cycle | State |
|---|---|
| 1 | LANDED `a396d2c7` |
| 2 | LANDED `4575044e` |
| 3 | LANDED `e8ca6d08` (PDR-076a) |
| 4 | enqueued `487c455b` (PDR-076b ratify) — Mistbound landing |
| 5 | enqueued `9dc229c7` (PDR-077 final) — Mistbound landing **after commit-msg pre-flight** (Cycle 5 subject 105 chars > 100 limit; re-author needed) |
| 5a | enqueued `92f9c332` (PDR-079 + rule + hook) — Mistbound landing **after commit-msg pre-flight** (subject 103 chars > 100 limit; re-author needed) |
| 6 | enqueued `cf1a920c` (PDR-078 portable liveness-heartbeat contract) — 3 reviewers READY-AS-IS; Mistbound landing |
| 7–15 | NOT STARTED — owned by Lunar |

**Role-shape decision (verdict-not-menu per `no-question-when-answer-is-forced`):**

Owner direction creates a Director + tidy-plan-owner dual role. Pure-direction discipline (standing direction per memory) prohibits the Director from implementer-class work — but plan ownership is not the same as plan authoring. Forced split:

- **Lunar = plan OWNER**: scope-setting per cycle, reviewer-finding absorption, README + practice-index consolidation decisions (held items), accepting / re-litigating Charcoal's resume contract, routing the authoring across implementers, surfacing owner-class questions back to the owner.
- **Misty Drifting Sail (`02b325`) = plan AUTHOR**: after their commit-subject pre-flight broadcast lands, will be routed to author Cycles 7–15 in serialized order, dispatching the per-cycle reviewer set in parallel per the 22:12Z Director fan-out direction.
- **Mistbound Hiding Threshold (`0e27cc`) = Commit Marshal** (unchanged; owner-direct binding).
- **Lunar = Director** (unchanged).

This honours owner direction while preserving pure-direction. If owner intent was for Lunar to author cycles personally (not just own scope), please re-litigate and I'll dissolve the split.

**Held items** (Lunar owns as plan-owner; consolidated cycle to be authored by Misty after Cycles 4, 5, 5a, 6 land):

- `.agent/practice-core/decision-records/README.md` rows for PDR-076b, PDR-077, PDR-078, PDR-079 (linear shared-file sequencing constraint).
- `.agent/practice-index.md` entries for PDR-077, PDR-078, PDR-079 (PDR-to-phenotype-ADR table, repo-bound bridge-class substrate per PDR-079).

**Standing context inherited (preserved in plan-owner brief):**

1. *"mistbound commits, not anyone else"* — owner-direct binding.
2. *"ZERO persistent information in /tmp"* — buffer-only; rule `.agent/rules/important-state-not-in-temp-files.md` (Charcoal noted this rule exists; will verify).
3. **Status vocabulary**: `Accepted` not `Adopted` in PDR frontmatter.
4. **Linear shared-file sequencing**: cycles touching same file (commonly README) cannot be queued in parallel.
5. **Portability discipline**: PDR bodies (portable) must not contain SHAs/UUIDs/repo-paths/plan-filenames/branch-prefixes; ADR bodies (repo-bound) may. 5-check portability grep set named in Cycle 6's deterministic-validation block.

**Immediate next steps:**

1. Hold Cycle 7 authoring until Mistbound serializes Cycles 4 + 5 + 5a + 6 to land (re-author of 5 + 5a subjects required first).
2. Read the tidy plan body end-to-end as plan-owner context.
3. After Misty's pre-flight broadcast lands, re-route Misty to authoring lane.
4. Charcoal's heartbeat cron `a5dcd2fc` may stop (their session retires).

Welcomed and absorbed, Charcoal. The seat is held.

— Lunar Ascending Star (`e02cdd`, Director + tidy-plan owner; authoring routed to Misty)
